QA Agent Test Target

Each page below is designed to trigger one specific finding from the QA agent testers. Serve this directory with python3 -m http.server 8080 and point the agent at any page.

accessibility.py

  • missing-alt.html → Images missing alt attribute
  • unhelpful-alt.html → Images with unhelpful alt text
  • missing-h1.html → Page missing h1 heading
  • multiple-h1.html → Multiple h1 headings
  • heading-skip.html → Heading level skipped
  • empty-links.html → Empty links found
  • generic-links.html → Generic link text used
  • low-contrast.html → Low color contrast detected
  • aria-hidden-focusable.html → Focusable element inside aria-hidden
  • invalid-aria-role.html → Invalid ARIA role
  • aria-reference.html → ARIA reference points to missing element
  • missing-main-landmark.html → Missing main landmark
  • multiple-main-landmarks.html → Multiple main landmarks
  • missing-lang.html → Missing language attribute
  • invalid-lang.html → Invalid language code
  • missing-skip-link.html → Missing skip navigation link
  • broken-skip-link.html → Skip link target missing
  • motion-no-query.html → Animations without reduced-motion support

wcag_compliance.py

  • svg-no-name.html → SVG elements missing accessible name (WCAG 1.1.1)
  • canvas-no-fallback.html → Canvas elements missing fallback content (WCAG 1.1.1)
  • video-no-captions.html → Video elements missing captions track (WCAG 1.2.2)
  • audio-no-transcript.html → Audio elements missing text alternative (WCAG 1.2.1)
  • icon-no-name.html → Icon elements missing accessible name (WCAG 1.1.1)
  • table-no-headers.html → Data tables missing header markup (WCAG 1.3.1)
  • radio-no-fieldset.html → Radio/checkbox group not in fieldset (WCAG 1.3.1)
  • css-order-resequence.html → CSS visual order differs from DOM order (WCAG 1.3.2)
  • personal-no-autocomplete.html → Personal info inputs missing autocomplete (WCAG 1.3.5)
  • links-color-only.html → Links distinguished by color only (WCAG 1.4.1)
  • input-low-border-contrast.html → Form input borders have low contrast (WCAG 1.4.11)
  • title-tooltip.html → Native title tooltips used for content (WCAG 1.4.13)
  • no-page-title.html → Page has no title (WCAG 2.4.2)
  • generic-page-title.html → Page title is generic/boilerplate (WCAG 2.4.2)
  • focus-outline-suppressed.html → Focus indicator suppressed without replacement (WCAG 2.4.7)
  • aria-label-mismatch.html → Accessible name does not include visible label (WCAG 2.5.3)
  • small-click-targets.html → Small click targets detected (WCAG 2.5.5)
  • form-missing-label.html → Form inputs missing accessible label (WCAG 3.3.2)
  • aria-invalid-no-msg.html → Error fields missing error message association (WCAG 3.3.1)
  • duplicate-ids.html → Duplicate id attributes found (WCAG 4.1.1)
  • aria-role-no-name.html → ARIA role elements missing accessible name (WCAG 4.1.2)
  • clickable-div-no-role.html → Clickable elements without role or keyboard access (WCAG 4.1.2)
  • notification-no-live.html → Probable notification elements missing live region (WCAG 4.1.3)
  • aria-missing-required-props.html → ARIA roles missing required properties (WCAG 4.1.2)
  • aria-widget-violations.html → ARIA widget pattern violations (WCAG 4.1.2)
  • aria-child-wrong-parent.html → ARIA child roles outside required parent (WCAG 4.1.2)
  • redundant-aria-roles.html → Redundant ARIA roles on semantic HTML (WCAG 4.1.2)

forms.py

  • required-unmarked.html → Required fields not visually marked
  • input-no-validation-ui.html → No visual feedback for invalid input
  • error-msg-not-associated.html → Error message not associated with input
  • placeholder-only-label.html → Form inputs use placeholder as only label
  • form-inputs-no-label.html → Form inputs without labels
  • wrong-input-type.html → Inputs not using semantic HTML5 types
  • missing-autocomplete.html → Missing autocomplete attributes
  • form-no-submit.html → Form without submit button
  • single-field-no-enter.html → Single-field form may not submit on Enter

keyboard.py

  • hidden-focusable.html → Hidden element receives focus
  • illogical-tab-order.html → Illogical tab order detected
  • arrow-key-no-effect.html → Arrow keys not functional in widget
  • modal-no-escape.html → Escape key doesn't close modal
  • keyboard-trap.html → Potential keyboard trap detected
  • missing-focus-indicators.html → Missing focus indicators

mouse.py

  • wrong-cursor.html → Clickable element has wrong cursor
  • disabled-not-distinct.html → Disabled element not visually distinct
  • no-hover-feedback.html → Interactive elements lack hover feedback
  • dblclick-no-effect.html → Double-click handler has no effect
  • context-menu-no-keyboard.html → Context menu not keyboard accessible
  • draggable-no-aria.html → Draggable element lacks ARIA attributes
  • small-click-targets.html → Small click targets detected
  • overlapping-targets.html → Overlapping clickable elements

errors.py

  • console-error.html → Console error detected
  • console-warnings.html → Multiple console warnings
  • js-exception.html → JavaScript exception
  • broken-images.html → Broken images detected
  • empty-href.html → Empty href links
  • broken-anchors.html → Broken anchor links
